_comment: Importable Azure DevOps classic Release Definition template for ALbuild Marketplace (AppSource) release. Replace placeholders in <angle brackets> and import via Releases > New > Import. The single inline PowerShell step calls Submit-BcMarketplaceApp from the businessdev.ALbuild module.
name: ALbuild - Release to Marketplace

inputs.script:
Import-Module businessdev.ALbuild
$secure = ConvertTo-SecureString $env:PC_CLIENT_SECRET -AsPlainText -Force
Submit-BcMarketplaceApp -ProductName '<PRODUCT NAME>' -AppFile '<PATH TO APP>' -TenantId $env:PC_TENANT_ID -ClientId $env:PC_CLIENT_ID -ClientSecret $secure -AutoPromote
